privileged_info_summary: I confirmed that the tactical SOP document is synthetically generated via setup_task.sh at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/tactical_sop.txt. The required QGroundControl configurations perfectly map to the contents of this injected file: the UI color scheme must be 'Outdoor' (setting value 1), audio must be completely muted (true), the map provider must be changed to 'Esri', the video source configured to 'RTSP Video Stream', and the RTSP URL set exactly to 'rtsp://10.0.5.50:8554/tactical_feed'.
